cells.rationale: A subtle correctness invariant in an event-sourced daemon — must not loosen the SHARED_BASE_BROKEN safety net, must keep starvation probing out of any fold for re-fold determinism, and touches reason-slot contracts — a nameable correctness gate that overrides the GPT-first default.
